summary_text: **Findings** - `Medium`: Provider misconfiguration can fail non-obviously. `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER` is not validated; anything other than `manus`/`auto` skips Manus and falls through to Gemini, then fails only if `GEMINI_API_KEY` is missing ([note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L281), [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L317)). - `Medium`: Overlay is all-or-nothing. Composition runs only when both `thumbnail_overlay_title` and `thumbnail_overlay_subtitle` are present; partial config silently disables overlay ([note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L285), [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L332)). - `Medium`: Overlay output format mismatch risk. Compose always writes JPEG even if output path ends with `.png`, which can create extension/content mismatch in downstream consumers ([note-thumbnail-compose.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py#L116)). - `Low`: Frontmatter parser is simplistic and silently “last key wins”; duplicate keys in active draft mean only the second `thumbnail_prompt` is used ([note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L68), [ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md#L12), [ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md#L13)). - `Low`: `note-semi-auto` help text is stale (`--action` list omits `thumbnail`, `thumbnail-upload`, `full`) though runtime validation supports them ([note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L20), [note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L61)). **Env/Auth Checks** - Thumbnail path requires either Manus access (`auto/manus`) or `GEMINI_API_KEY`; if overlay is enabled, also requires `python3` + Pillow (`PIL`) at runtime ([note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L317), [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L112), [note-thumbnail-compose.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py#L4)). - Upload path in `note-semi-auto` still requires `NOTE_SESSION_V5` via upload helper when `--action` includes upload ([note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L151), [note-draft-upload.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L9)). **Test Coverage** - Executed and passing: `bash tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh`, `bash tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh`. - Coverage gap: tests use mocks and do not exercise real Gemini/Manus calls, Manus fallback behavior, compose dependency failures (`python3`/Pillow), or extension/content consistency ([test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh#L29), [test-note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-note-semi-auto.sh#L51)).
